notes.network_mode: host — all containers share the host network stack; no Docker port mapping
notes.port_discovery: Use 'docker logs keng-controller | grep HTTPS' to confirm ports (docker inspect shows empty Ports for host-network containers)
notes.tls: Controller uses self-signed certificate; use curl -k or snappi verify=False
notes.otg_alignment: OTG config port.location must match the 'location' keys in location_map: 'veth-a' and 'veth-z'
